journey.title: Our Journey
journey.subtitle: From knitted substrate specialist to integrated materials partner
journey.description: A business shaped by manufacturing depth, customer-specific development, and a clear push toward higher-value coating and technical textile innovation.

milestones.title: Built on knitting and coated textile know-how

milestones.title: New textile lines introduced
milestones.description: Raised fabrics, 3D spacer fabrics, and recycled-yarn options expanded the portfolio and strengthened Nirbhay's position in technical and sustainable materials.

milestones.title: Laminating, PU coating, and R&D pipeline
milestones.description: The next chapter includes contract manufacturing, coated 3D fabrics, breathable water-based coatings, and FR fabric development for high-performance applications.

banner.title: About Us
banner.subtitle: Manufacturing depth with an innovation-led next chapter

journeySection.title: How Nirbhay Is Evolving
journeySection.storyTitle: From knitted substrate specialist to integrated materials partner
paragraphs: Nirbhay Knitting Industries Pvt. Ltd. operates from Halol near Vadodara in Gujarat, India. The company has built a reputation on complete in-house manufacturing and testing for knitted fabrics, vinyl coating applications, and customer-specific industrial requirements.

Today, Nirbhay's next growth phase is driven by broader product development, sustainable processing, and vertical integration through coating, laminating, and the representation of Interplast Kimya. That shift is expanding the company from a textile manufacturer into a more complete materials and coatings partner.

milestones.title: Knitted fabrics and coated textile support
milestones.description: Core manufacturing centered on knitted fabrics, vinyl coating support, and industrial application know-how.

milestones.title: In-house testing capability
milestones.description: Quality control and customer-specific validation became central to the company's operating model.

milestones.title: Interplast Kimya represented
milestones.description: PU resins and lacquers strengthened vertical integration and cross-selling potential.

milestones.title: New fabric categories launched
milestones.description: 3D spacer fabrics, raised fabrics, and recycled-yarn developments broadened the offer.

milestones.title: Coating and innovation pipeline expands
milestones.description: Laminating, PU coating, coated 3D materials, FR trials, and breathable coatings define the current direction.

story.title: Built for industrial performance
paragraphs: Nirbhay combines manufacturing capability, coating support, and testing discipline for applications where consistency and customization matter. Its current portfolio spans knitted fabrics, vinyl coated textiles, advanced fabric developments, and value-added coating services.

The company is now pushing into higher-value material systems through laminating, PU coating, Interplast-linked chemistry support, and a focused innovation pipeline that includes coated 3D constructions, FR fabrics, and water-based breathable coatings.

banner.title: Nirbhay Knitting
banner.subtitle: Knitted fabrics engineered for industrial performance
banner.description: From base fabrics for coated applications to advanced spacer, raised, recycled, and FR developments, the knitting division is built around customization, fast response, and dependable process control.

features.name: Knitted Base Fabrics
features.description: Customized knitted fabrics designed to deliver comfort, flexibility, strength, and reliable support for vinyl coating and other industrial end uses.

features.name: 3D Spacer Fabrics
features.description: Three-dimensional fabric structures developed for cushioning, breathability, spacing, and higher-value technical applications across multiple sectors.

features.name: Raised Fabrics
features.description: Raised surface constructions introduced to add tactile comfort, visual texture, and premium feel where a richer material surface is required.

features.name: Recycled Yarn Fabrics
features.description: Lower-impact fabric options developed with recycled yarn inputs for customers seeking more sustainable material choices, even at early-stage volume levels.

features.name: FR Fabrics in Development
features.description: Ongoing R&D and customer trials for high-end flame-retardant fabrics aimed at safety clothing, safety footwear, and performance-driven industrial uses.

contentBlock.title: Knitting capability backed by testing and customization
contentBlock.description: Nirbhay's knitting operations are supported by in-house testing facilities, responsive product development, and disciplined production control - helping customers move from requirement to supply with more confidence.

banner.title: NirChem

banner.description: NirChem extends Nirbhay's offering through PU coating, laminating, vinyl coated textile support, specialty finishes, and the added strength of Interplast Kimya representation.

contentBlock.title: Where chemistry and textile know-how come together

banner.title: Sustainability
banner.subtitle: Responsible process choices built into manufacturing
banner.description: Nirbhay's sustainability direction is grounded in water-free finishing, zero discharge operations, efficient utilities, and lower-impact product development.

intro.title: How we approach responsible manufacturing
paragraphs: Nirbhay's sustainability profile comes from practical operating choices: all finishing processes are water free, the facility follows a zero discharge model, and core energy inputs are limited to electricity and gas. These decisions reduce process complexity while supporting cleaner production discipline.

The product roadmap also reflects this direction. Recycled yarn fabric options are already part of the portfolio, while new development work focuses on lower-footprint coating systems, coated 3D materials, and water-based breathable solutions for the future.

pillars.title: Zero Discharge Facility
pillars.description: Manufacturing is positioned around zero discharge operations, giving customers a stronger sustainability story and better alignment with international expectations.

pillars.title: Water-Free Finishing
pillars.description: All finishing processes are water free, reducing water dependency and helping simplify environmental process management.

pillars.title: Efficient Utility Profile
pillars.description: The facility runs on electricity and gas only, supporting a more controlled and efficient production setup.

pillars.title: Lower-Impact Product Development
pillars.description: Recycled yarn fabrics, future water-based coatings, and cleaner finishing choices are part of a broader move toward more responsible material innovation.

stats.label: Primary energy inputs: electricity and gas
